Localization.Description: User NTLM authentication failed because the account is a member of the Protected User group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to pass NTLM authentication on host {event_src.host}. Reason: the account is a member of the Protected User group.
The user {subject.account.name} failed to pass NTLM authentication on host {event_src.host}. Reason: the account is a member of the Protected User group.
